message:
fix(btrfs): add missing required fields to test superblock fixture

build_test_btrfs_superblock was missing total_bytes, bytes_used, root,
chunk_root, root_dir_objectid, and num_devices fields required by the
strict btrfs parser. Fixed 15+ failing tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
